overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the medieval city of Novigrad. The character travels from a canal dock through cobblestone streets, passing under a stone archway into a lower district with taverns, and finally approaching a large city gate. The scene features detailed medieval architecture with half-timbered houses and stone buildings under clear daylight.

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden dock beside canal, observing the water and half-timbered buildings

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the edge of the dock facing the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming walkway along canal
traditional medieval buildings with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
tall stone retaining wall along right side of dock
wooden bridge structure spanning canal in distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock alongside a canal in a medieval city. The character walks forward along the weathered planks, passing a person sitting by the water, then turns left onto a cobblestone path. Half-timbered houses line the far side of the canal while a stone wall runs along the right.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a cobblestone path beside a high stone retaining wall with trees visible above. The character follows a townsman in green clothing while half-timbered buildings appear on the right. Market stalls with colorful awnings are visible in the distance ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a narrow, enclosed cobblestone street flanked by tall timber-framed houses. A guard in striped livery leans against the wall on the left. The street leads toward a dark stone archway ahead, with pedestrians passing in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower town district with tavern and outdoor seating

crosses small wooden bridge over drainage channel

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stone archway into a lower town district with dirt paths. The character walks past a tavern on the left where patrons sit at outdoor tables under a canvas awning. The ground transitions from cobblestone to muddy dirt as the character crosses a small wooden bridge over a drainage channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy thoroughfare approaching main city gate with market activity

agents.ego_description: walking through muddy lower town streets toward the large city gate with portcullis

wooden market stalls with canvas roofs along right side

segments.scene_description: Walking through a wider muddy thoroughfare in the lower town, approaching an imposing stone city gate with a raised portcullis. Market stalls line the right side of the street while various townspeople walk toward the gate. The architecture features heavy stone fortifications and timber-framed buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval city, transitioning from a serene canal dock into the bustling, muddy thoroughfares of a lower district. It begins on weathered wooden planks beside a canal, moving past a seated figure before turning onto a cobblestone path flanked by a high stone wall and half-timbered houses. As the camera follows a townsman toward distant market stalls, the scene shifts into a narrow, enclosed street lined with tall timber-framed buildings and a leaning guard. The perspective then passes through a dark stone archway, where the terrain transforms from clean cobblestones to muddy dirt paths as the character walks past an outdoor tavern and crosses a small wooden bridge. Finally, the path opens into a wide thoroughfare lined with market stalls, leading directly toward an imposing stone city gate with a raised portcullis.
